title: BSX: Boston Scientific Sports Growth At A Reasonable Price
text: Healthcare stocks have beaten the S&P 500 so far this year with particular relative strength seen in Medical Device stocks. Boston Scientific features a reasonable earnings multiple, given a hearty growth outlook.

title: Boston Scientific (BSX) Down 6.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: Boston Scientific (BSX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Boston Scientific to Participate in Bank of America Global Healthcare Conference
text: MARLBOROUGH, Mass. , May 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) will participate in Bank of America's Global Healthcare Conference on Thursday, May 12.
